name: settlements
sql:
CREATE TABLE settlements (
    id_settlements INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    title_of_settlements VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL
)

name: sqlite_sequence
sql: CREATE TABLE sqlite_sequence(name,seq)

name: citizenship
sql:
CREATE TABLE citizenship (
    id_citizenship INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    citizenship VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL
)

name: education
sql:
CREATE TABLE education (
    id_education INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    education VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL
)

name: type_of_punishment
sql:
CREATE TABLE type_of_punishment (
    id_type_of_punishment INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    type_of_punishment VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL
)

name: article
sql:
CREATE TABLE article (
    id_article INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    number_of_article NUMERIC(4,2) NOT NULL CHECK (number_of_article >= 1 AND number_of_article <= 99.99),
    description TEXT NOT NULL
)

name: type_intoxication
sql:
CREATE TABLE type_intoxication (
    id_type_intoxication INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    type_intoxication VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL
)

name: type_violation
sql:
CREATE TABLE type_violation (
    id_type_violation INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    type_violation VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL
)

name: type_report
sql:
CREATE TABLE type_report (
    id_type_report INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    type_report VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL
)

name: responsibility
sql:
CREATE TABLE responsibility (
    id_responsibility INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    type_of_responsibility VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL
)

name: post
sql:
CREATE TABLE post (
    id_post INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    post VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL
)

name: family_status
sql:
CREATE TABLE family_status (
    id_family_status INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    family_status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL
)

name: articles_and_responsobility
sql:
CREATE TABLE articles_and_responsobility (
    id_articles_and_responsibility INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    responsibility INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES responsibility(id_responsibility),
    article INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES article(id_article)
)

name: structures
sql:
CREATE TABLE structures (
    id_structures INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    settlement INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES settlements(id_settlements),
    description TEXT NOT NULL
)

name: citizens
sql:
CREATE TABLE citizens (
    id_citizens INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    last_name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    first_name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    patronymic VARCHAR(50) NULL,
    birthday DATE NOT NULL,
    settlement_of_birth INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES settlements(id_settlements),
    address_registration VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL CHECK (length(address_registration) >= 5),
    working_place INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES structures(id_structures),
    post INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES post(id_post),
    criminal_record BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
    count_record INTEGER NOT NULL,
    passport_series_and_number BIGINT NOT NULL CHECK (passport_series_and_number >= 1000000000 AND passport_series_and_number <= 9999999999),
    family_status INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES family_status(id_family_status),
    education INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES education(id_education),
    citizenship INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES citizenship(id_citizenship)
)

name: citizens_and_posts
sql:
CREATE TABLE citizens_and_posts (
    id_citizens_and_posts INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    citizen INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES citizens(id_citizens),
    citizen_post INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES post(id_post)
)

name: deal
sql:
CREATE TABLE deal (
    id_deal INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    deal_number INTEGER NOT NULL,
    settlement INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES settlements(id_settlements),
    offender INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES citizens(id_citizens),
    police_officer INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES citizens_and_posts(id_citizens_and_posts),
    article INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES article(id_article),
    responsibility INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES responsibility(id_responsibility)
)

name: statement
sql:
CREATE TABLE statement (
    id_statement INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    applicant INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES citizens(id_citizens),
    content TEXT NOT NULL,
    date DATE NOT NULL,
    time TIME NOT NULL CHECK (time BETWEEN '00:00:00' AND '23:59:59'),
    police_officer INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES citizens_and_posts(id_citizens_and_posts),
    signature_applicant BOOLEAN NULL,
    signature_police_officer BOOLEAN NULL
)

name: appeals
sql:
CREATE TABLE appeals (
    id_appeals INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    appeal_citizen INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES citizens(id_citizens),
    police_officer INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES citizens_and_posts(id_citizens_and_posts),
    content TEXT NOT NULL
)

name: explanation_protocol
sql:
CREATE TABLE explanation_protocol (
    id_explanation_protocol INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    date DATE NOT NULL,
    citizen INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES citizens(id_citizens),
    deal INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES deal(id_deal),
    signature_for_error_testimony BOOLEAN NULL,
    signature_for_knowing_everithing BOOLEAN NULL,
    content TEXT NOT NULL,
    need_forensic_medical_examination BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
    need_medical_examination_certificate BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
    citizen_signature BOOLEAN NULL,
    police_officer_signature BOOLEAN NULL
)

name: forensic_medical_examination
sql:
CREATE TABLE forensic_medical_examination (
    id_forensic_medical_examination INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    date DATE NOT NULL,
    structure INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES structures(id_structures),
    deal INTEGER NULL REFERENCES deal(id_deal),
    expert INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES citizens_and_posts(id_citizens_and_posts),
    content TEXT NOT NULL,
    physical_injuries BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
    severity_of_harm_to_health BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
    could_injuries_have_occurred_on_time BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
    number_of_examination INTEGER NOT NULL,
    signature_expert BOOLEAN NULL
)

name: medical_examination_report
sql:
CREATE TABLE medical_examination_report (
    id_medical_examination_report INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    deal INTEGER NULL REFERENCES deal(id_deal),
    report INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES type_report(id_type_report),
    patient INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES citizens(id_citizens),
    date DATE NOT NULL,
    time TIME NOT NULL CHECK (time BETWEEN '00:00:00' AND '23:59:59'),
    signs_of_intoxication TEXT NOT NULL,
    content TEXT NOT NULL,
    approval BOOLEAN NULL,
    signature BOOLEAN NULL
)

name: medical_examination_certificate
sql:
CREATE TABLE medical_examination_certificate (
    id_medical_examination_certificate INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    medical_examination_report INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES medical_examination_report(id_medical_examination_report),
    date DATE NOT NULL,
    time TIME NOT NULL CHECK (time BETWEEN '00:00:00' AND '23:59:59'),
    medical_institution INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES structures(id_structures),
    doctor INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES citizens_and_posts(id_citizens_and_posts),
    signs_of_intoxication TEXT NOT NULL,
    result TEXT NOT NULL,
    type_intoxication INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES type_intoxication(id_type_intoxication),
    doctor_signature BOOLEAN NULL
)

name: administrative_protocol
sql:
CREATE TABLE administrative_protocol (
    id_protocol INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    protocol_number INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (protocol_number >= 1000 AND protocol_number <= 999999),
    making_date DATE NOT NULL,
    making_time TIME NOT NULL CHECK (making_time BETWEEN '00:00:00' AND '23:59:59'),
    deal INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES deal(id_deal),
    description TEXT NOT NULL,
    other_information TEXT NOT NULL,
    signature_for_knowing_everithing BOOLEAN NULL,
    first_witness INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES citizens(id_citizens),
    second_witness INTEGER NULL REFERENCES citizens(id_citizens)
)

name: resolution
sql:
CREATE TABLE resolution (
    id_resolution INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    number_of_protocol INTEGER CHECK (number_of_protocol IS NULL OR (number_of_protocol >= 1000 AND number_of_protocol <= 999999)),
    date DATE NOT NULL,
    time TIME NOT NULL CHECK (time BETWEEN '00:00:00' AND '23:59:59'),
    structure INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES structures(id_structures),
    court_staff INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES citizens_and_posts(id_citizens_and_posts),
    deal INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES deal(id_deal),
    resolution TEXT NOT NULL,
    punishment INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES type_of_punishment(id_type_of_punishment),
    fine_sum INTEGER NULL CHECK (fine_sum IS NULL OR (fine_sum >= 0 AND fine_sum <= 1000000)),
    days_of_arrest INTEGER NULL
)

name: validate_offender_age
sql:
CREATE TRIGGER validate_offender_age
    BEFORE INSERT ON administrative_protocol
    FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
    SELECT CASE
        WHEN (
            SELECT (julianday('now') - julianday(c.birthday)) / 365.25 
            FROM citizens c 
            JOIN deal d ON c.id_citizens = d.offender 
            WHERE d.id_deal = NEW.deal
        ) < 16
        THEN RAISE(ABORT, 'Нельзя составить административный протокол на гражданина младше 16 лет')
    END;
END

name: check_admin_protocol_date
sql:
CREATE TRIGGER check_admin_protocol_date
    BEFORE INSERT ON administrative_protocol
    FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
    SELECT CASE
        WHEN NEW.making_date > DATE('now') 
        THEN RAISE(ABORT, 'Дата в таблице administrative_protocol не может быть в будущем. Указанная дата: ' || NEW.making_date)
    END;
END

name: validate_admin_protocol_date
sql:
CREATE TRIGGER validate_admin_protocol_date
    BEFORE INSERT ON administrative_protocol
    FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
    SELECT CASE
        WHEN NEW.making_date > DATE('now')

    SELECT CASE

name: validate_deal_sequence
sql:
CREATE TRIGGER validate_deal_sequence
    BEFORE INSERT ON deal
    FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
    SELECT CASE
        WHEN NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM statement s
            JOIN citizens applicant ON s.applicant = applicant.id_citizens
            JOIN citizens offender ON NEW.offender = offender.id_citizens
            WHERE (
                (s.applicant != NEW.offender)
                OR (s.content LIKE '%' || offender.last_name || '%')
                OR (s.content LIKE '%кража%' OR s.content LIKE '%нарушение%' OR s.content LIKE '%избиение%')
            )
            AND s.date <= DATE('now')
            AND s.date >= DATE('now', '-1 year')
        )
        THEN RAISE(ABORT, 'Нельзя создать дело №' || NEW.deal_number || ' на гражданина ' || 
            (SELECT last_name FROM citizens WHERE id_citizens = NEW.offender) || ' без соответствующего заявления')
    END;
END

name: validate_explanation_protocol_sequence
sql:
CREATE TRIGGER validate_explanation_protocol_sequence
    BEFORE INSERT ON explanation_protocol
    FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
    SELECT CASE
        WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM deal WHERE id_deal = NEW.deal)
        THEN RAISE(ABORT, 'Нельзя создать протокол объяснения без дела')
    END;
END

name: validate_admin_protocol_sequence
sql:
CREATE TRIGGER validate_admin_protocol_sequence
    BEFORE INSERT ON administrative_protocol
    FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
    SELECT CASE
        WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM explanation_protocol WHERE deal = NEW.deal)
        THEN RAISE(ABORT, 'Нельзя создать административный протокол без протокола объяснения')
    END;
END

name: validate_medical_report_sequence
sql:
CREATE TRIGGER validate_medical_report_sequence
    BEFORE INSERT ON medical_examination_report
    FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
    SELECT CASE
        WHEN NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM explanation_protocol
            WHERE deal = NEW.deal
            AND need_medical_examination_certificate = 1
        )
        THEN RAISE(ABORT, 'Нельзя создать направление на медицинское освидетельствование без соответствующего указания в протоколе объяснения')
    END;
END

name: validate_medical_certificate_sequence
sql:
CREATE TRIGGER validate_medical_certificate_sequence
    BEFORE INSERT ON medical_examination_certificate
    FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
    SELECT CASE
        WHEN NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM medical_examination_report
            WHERE id_medical_examination_report = NEW.medical_examination_report
        )
        THEN RAISE(ABORT, 'Нельзя создать акт медицинского освидетельствования без направления на медицинское освидетельствование')
    END;
END

name: validate_forensic_exam_sequence
sql:
CREATE TRIGGER validate_forensic_exam_sequence
    BEFORE INSERT ON forensic_medical_examination
    FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
    SELECT CASE
        WHEN NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM explanation_protocol
            WHERE deal = NEW.deal
            AND need_forensic_medical_examination = 1
        )
        THEN RAISE(ABORT, 'Нельзя создать судебно-медицинскую экспертизу без соответствующего указания в протоколе объяснения')
    END;
END

name: validate_resolution_sequence
sql:
CREATE TRIGGER validate_resolution_sequence
    BEFORE INSERT ON resolution
    FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
    SELECT CASE
        WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM administrative_protocol WHERE deal = NEW.deal)
        THEN RAISE(ABORT, 'Нельзя создать постановление без административного протокола')
    END;
END

name: trg_update_violation_count
sql:
CREATE TRIGGER trg_update_violation_count
    AFTER INSERT ON administrative_protocol
    FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
    UPDATE citizens
    SET count_record = count_record + 1
    WHERE id_citizens = (
        SELECT d.offender 
        FROM deal d 
        WHERE d.id_deal = NEW.deal
    );
END

name: trg_update_criminal_record
sql:
CREATE TRIGGER trg_update_criminal_record
    AFTER INSERT ON resolution
    FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
    UPDATE citizens
    SET criminal_record = 1
    WHERE id_citizens = (
        SELECT d.offender 
        FROM deal d 
        WHERE d.id_deal = NEW.deal
    );
END

name: _statement
sql:
CREATE TABLE "_statement" (
	id_statement INTEGER,
	applicant INTEGER,
	content NVARCHAR(128),
	date NVARCHAR(50),
	time NVARCHAR(50),
	police_officer INTEGER,
	signature_applicant INTEGER,
	signature_police_officer INTEGER
)

name: categories
sql:
CREATE TABLE categories (
	id NUMERIC NOT NULL,
	name varchar(50),
	description TEXT NOT NULL
)

name: roles
sql:
CREATE TABLE roles (
	id NUMERIC NOT NULL,
	role_id varchar(50),
	description TEXT NOT NULL
)

name: sender
sql:
CREATE TABLE sender (
	id int4 NOT NULL,
	sender varchar(50),
	description TEXT,
	requisits varchar(50)
)

name: users
sql:
CREATE TABLE users (
	id NUMERIC NOT NULL,
	lastname varchar(50),
	firstname varchar(50),
	patronymic varchar(50),
	login varchar(50),
	password varchar(255),
	balance NUMERIC(10,2),
	"role" int4 NOT NULL,
	created_at TIMESTAMP(29)
)

name: limits
sql:
CREATE TABLE limits (
	id NUMERIC NOT NULL,
	user_id int4 NOT NULL,
	date_beginning TIMESTAMP(13) NOT NULL,
	date_ending TIMESTAMP(13) NOT NULL,
	sum_limit NUMERIC(10,2)
)

name: recipient
sql:
CREATE TABLE recipient (

	user_id int4,
	name varchar(50),
	requisites int8,

)

name: transactions
sql:
CREATE TABLE transactions (
	id NUMERIC NOT NULL,
	sender int4,
	user_id int4,
	category_id int4 NOT NULL,
	recipient_id int4,
	amount NUMERIC(10,2),
